name: Tvp® Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 6-8 oz. dry chunk style TVP® (Lummen Foods "Beef" flavor works well)
1 cup full-fat sour cream (I think I used just 1/2 cup)
You will also need eggless noodles and poppy seeds.
recipeInstructions:
1. Reconstitute TVP® according to directions.
2. While the TVP® is soaking, sauté mushrooms, onion, and garlic together in a pan over medium heat until softened.
3. Reserve 1/3 cup vegetable broth.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (except flour) to the mushroom/onion mixture. Heat to boiling and simmer for a minute or two.
5. Add the reconstituted TVP® to the dish and simmer for 15-30 minutes, until the TVP® reaches your desired consistency.
6. In a shaker container, combine 1/3 cup reserved vegetable broth with 1 tablespoon flour. Shake well to mix.
7. Stir the flour mixture into the dish over low heat until thickened.
8. Turn off the heat and fold in the sour cream (you can use less than a cup if you wish).
9. Serve the sauce over eggless noodles and sprinkle with poppy seeds.
Variations: Add some cooking sherry for extra flavor!
